title: Huawei OptiXstar EN8245X6s-8N, XGS-PON ONT Gateway, WiFi 6
description: The Huawei OptiXstar EN8245X6s-8N is an intelligent ONT router utilizing XGS-PON and Wi-Fi 6 technologies. It provides ultra-broadband access, high performance, and extensive coverage. The device offers 1x 2.5 Gbit and 3x 1 Gbit Ethernet ports, 2x POTS ports, and a USB port. For the PON network, there is 1x SC/APC connector available Fast access to the wireless network is ensured by Wi-Fi 6 in the 2.4 & 5 GHz bands, supporting 4x4 MU-MIMO , with maximum transfer speeds reaching 1147 + 4804 Mbit/s . It also supports WPA3 , beamforming, and band steering With the USB 2.0 port, you can easily turn your router into a home multimedia center. The device supports FPT, DLNA, or SAMBA protocols, including printer sharing options Device Power adapter (12V / 3A)
specsSearch: Wireless features MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 1148 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 4 x 4 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 2 Optics Transmission speed 2.5 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1260 up to 1280 / 1575 up to 1580 Transfer type XGS-PON Polishing type APC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000/2500Mbps + (3) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Max. power consumption [W] 30 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 3A
